title: The Advanced Inventory Sorter
description: Press a keybind and boom! Your inventory is sorted based on your configuration!
body:
# **The Advanced Inventory Sorter**
![Configuration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c6463fbdcd7a478c7c72ada4b699a0c2a6f9eda_0.webp)
A keybind is added to sort your inventory in creative or survival! Allows for each slot to have a designated item/tag assigned to it. Useful for when you die and your inventory gets all jumbled!
